title: Top Bridal Makeup Trends for 2025 Weddings in Nepal
excerpt: From dewy glass skin bridal looks to bold statement lips — the top bridal makeup trends we're seeing this wedding season in Kathmandu.
body:
# Top Bridal Makeup Trends 2025

As Nepal's wedding season approaches, our expert makeup artists at Natural Beauty Clinic & Academy share the top trends.

## 2025 Bridal Makeup Trends

### 1. Glass Skin Foundation
Dewy, luminous base for a fresh natural look.

### 2. Warm Smoky Eyes
Gold and bronze tones with sharp eyeliner.

### 3. Traditional + Modern Fusion
Nepali traditional elements combined with modern techniques.

### 4. Long-Lasting HD Makeup
Camera-ready finish that lasts all day.

Book your bridal consultation at Natural Beauty Clinic & Academy — Call 9843805588.
author: Archana Silwal Kadel
